name: Google Skills
description: « Access over 3,000 courses, AI certifications from Google Cloud, DeepMind, and Grow with Google on a single platform. Get personalized learning paths (and 35 free monthly credits)

name: Noiz Agent
description: « Create podcasts, audiobooks, and videos with cinematic emotional voice cloning that laughs, whispers, and breathes naturally. The tool supports many languages and can also produce detailed transcripts to help you quickly assimilate information

name: Lip Sync AI
description: « Give any static image a voice. This tool animates faces by precisely synchronizing lip movements with your audio file. Features a Precision mode for complex angles and head movements, and a realistic video translation system

name: Shopify SimGym
description: « Simulate the buyer experience on your Shopify store with AI profiles that browse your pages like real customers. You get concrete feedback before rolling out theme changes or marketing campaigns

name: AdMakeAI
description: « Stop guessing which ads will work. This all-in-one platform spies on your competitors' strategies and automatically generates dozens of conversion-optimized text and image variations, ready to launch on your networks

name: HitPaw VikPea
description: « Give your blurry or pixelated videos a new lease on life. This software restores missing details, revives the colors of old black-and-white films, and boosts resolution up to 8K for crystal-clear clarity

name: GPT-5.2
description: « The OpenAI model built for long and complicated tasks. It has fewer hallucinations and improved multi-step reasoning. This LLM is great for creating tables, presentations, analyzing long documents, and coding

name: PixPretty AI Photo Editor
description: « An easy-to-use photo editor that instantly removes backgrounds, retouches portraits, and adjusts colors to produce clean, professional-looking images. Also enjoy customizable presets, RAW processing, and facial morphing tools

name: Luckpal
description: « A personalized guide inspired by Eastern metaphysical traditions, offering predictions about your career, fortune, love life, and the right time to take action. A kind of companion that helps you reflect on your destiny

name: Freudly AI Therapist
description: « Chat continuously with artificial intelligence specially designed for mental support and psychological listening. Conversations are geared toward understanding your emotions and helping you reflect on your personal life

name: Product Link To Video
description: « Instantly turn any product link into a viral video ad. Simply paste the URL of your store (Shopify, Amazon, etc.), and the tool automatically extracts images and information to create a complete promotional clip

name: VOMO AI
description: « Don't let a single word go unheard. Record your meetings, lectures, or memos and instantly get a perfect written transcript (in 50+ languages). The tool also generates smart summaries to save you valuable time

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
